englishDefinitions: Seen in a way that shows the true importance or scale of something.
Compared with other things so it seems more reasonable or understandable.
persianTranslation: در مقایسه و با دید درست
با در نظر گرفتن کل ماجرا
examples: When you put the problem in perspective, it does not seem so serious.
The numbers look bad, but in perspective, the situation is manageable.
She tried to keep the criticism in perspective.
